subject: Cannot join assigned breakout room
description: Host opened breakouts; user sees prompt but join fails or loops back to main room.

ts_steps.title: Accept prompt
ts_steps.action: Click Join when prompt visible; check for second monitor showing prompt hidden behind windows.

ts_steps.title: Update client
ts_steps.action: Minimum Zoom version required for breakout features — force update.

ts_steps.title: Rejoin meeting
ts_steps.action: Leave meeting entirely, rejoin with link, ask host to reassign breakout.

internal_information: Version skew between host and attendee, or webinar license limits. Firewall blocking breakout signaling rare.
